query:
SELECT 
  ql.id as leadId, ql.name, ql.phone, ql.createdAt as leadCreatedAt,
  cs.id as sessionId, cs.isBooked, cs.stage, cs.updatedAt, cs.messageHistory
FROM quote_leads ql
LEFT JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.leadPhone = ql.phone
WHERE ql.name LIKE '%Reingold%' OR ql.name LIKE '%reingold%'
ORDER BY ql.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
